content: Attended and presented at EASE 2026 on DSL Code Generation with LLMs.
Paper titled "Cross-Language Semantic Clone Detection with Instruction Fine-Tuned LLMs" accepted as a full paper for presentation at SEAA 2026 and publication in the conference proceedings.
Notification of acceptance for paper on DSL Code Generation at EASE conference.
Presented at AIware'25 on Extract Method Refactoring.
Paper titled "Automated Extract Method Refactoring with Open-Source LLMs: A Comparative Study" got accepted for publication in AIware'25.
Paper published in Empirical Software Engineering journal on design pattern recognition using large language models.
Started PhD research at TUM focusing on Generative AI for code migration and modernization.
